hero.headline: Your Vision is our Mission
hero.subtitle: Advanced ophthalmology care with cutting-edge technology and compassionate specialists dedicated to your vision health.

services.title: Our Ophthalmology Specialisms
services.subtitle: Precision-driven eye care designed for your comfort and lasting vision health.

bracesAligners.title: Comprehensive Eye Exams
bracesAligners.desc: Thorough examinations detecting vision problems and eye diseases at their earliest stages.

dentalImplants.title: LASIK Surgery
dentalImplants.desc: Advanced laser vision correction for a life free from glasses and contact lenses.

emergencyCare.title: Emergency Eye Care
emergencyCare.desc: Same-day urgent care for eye trauma, sudden vision loss, and infections. Our specialists are always on standby when you need us most.

teethWhitening.title: Cataract Surgery
teethWhitening.desc: Modern phacoemulsification with premium intraocular lens options for crystal clear vision.

rootCanal.title: Glaucoma Treatment
rootCanal.desc: Early detection and management of glaucoma to preserve your precious sight.

cosmeticDentistry.title: Pediatric Eye Care
cosmeticDentistry.desc: Gentle, specialized eye care for children from infancy through adolescence.

lowVisionServices.title: Low Vision Services
lowVisionServices.desc: Affordable glasses and lenses tailored to your needs. We understand and support you.

pediatricEyeCare.title: Pediatric Eye Care
pediatricEyeCare.desc: Gentle, child-friendly exams and affordable glasses when needed. We put little ones at ease.

eyeEvaluation.title: Eye Evaluation
eyeEvaluation.desc: Full eye exams and modern equipment. We help you choose the best glasses or lenses.

longTermEyeHealth.title: Long-Term Eye Health
longTermEyeHealth.desc: Ongoing care and check-ups to protect your vision. Prevention and wellness for the long run.

aboutDoctor.title: About The Doctor
aboutDoctor.quote: Our mission is to combine advanced technology with compassionate care to give every patient the gift of clear vision and lasting eye health.
aboutDoctor.description: Dr. Foster brings over two decades of experience in ophthalmology. She is committed to providing personalized care and staying at the forefront of eye care technology through continuous research and training.
aboutDoctor.bullet4: Member of American Academy of Ophthalmology

weCare.title: We Care More Than Just Your Eyes
weCare.description: Eye care center treatments are specialized services aimed at improving and maintaining eye health.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say About Us
testimonials.subtitle: Professional insights, health tips, and clinic updates directly from our panel of board-certified ophthalmologists.

testimonial1.content: After LASIK surgery here, I can see clearly for the first time in 20 years. The entire team was professional and caring throughout.
testimonial1.name: James Rodriguez

testimonial2.content: The cataract surgery changed my life. Dr. Foster explained everything clearly and the results exceeded my expectations.
testimonial2.name: Fatima Al-Hassan

testimonial3.content: Exceptional eye care from a team that truly cares. My annual exams always detect issues early. I trust them completely.
testimonial3.name: Marie Dubois

testimonial4.content: I was nervous about my procedure, but the doctors were so patient and explained everything. Recovery was much faster than I expected.
testimonial4.name: Rodrigo Aguilar

testimonial5.content: Our kids actually enjoy their eye exams here! The pediatric wing is so welcoming and the doctors are amazing with children. Perfect for families.
testimonial5.name: Emma Davis

testimonial6.content: Affordable, transparent pricing and high-quality eye care. There are no hidden costs and the results speak for themselves. This is now our go-to clinic.
testimonial6.name: Michael Chen

footer.description: Providing premium eye care since 2005. We combine the world's best specialists with modern medical technology to deliver unmatched vision outcomes.
